items.title: Rumen Radev looks set to win Bulgarian Parliamentary election
items.dek: Exit polls put his Progressive Bulgaria on 37%, more than double the score of the closest runner-up, but he will likely need to form a coalition to govern.
items.body: Exit polls put his Progressive Bulgaria on 37%, more than double the score of the closest runner-up, but he will likely need to form a coalition to govern.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: US intercepts and seizes Iranian-flagged cargo ship, Trump says
items.dek: Tehran has not commented on the incident, which comes as the US prepares for a second round of talks.
items.body: Tehran has not commented on the incident, which comes as the US prepares for a second round of talks.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Tehran will never cede control of Strait of Hormuz, senior Iranian politician tells BBC
items.dek: Lyse Doucet speaks to Ebrahim Azizi, who says Iran "will decide the right of passage" through the crucial shipping route.
items.body: Lyse Doucet speaks to Ebrahim Azizi, who says Iran "will decide the right of passage" through the crucial shipping route.
